title: Gateway profile
description: Metadata for one gateway model under gateways/<vendor>/<model>/gateway.json. The admin facts, credentials, config paths, chipset, and OUI must be verified against the captured reference/ documentation snapshot recorded in `provenance`.

vendor.description: Lowercase vendor slug; must equal the parent folder name.

model.description: Lowercase model slug; must equal the model folder name.

name.description: Human-readable product name (e.g. "RAK7268 WisGate Edge Lite 2").

regions.description: Region ids this model is authored for; each must exist in definitions/regions/.

chipset.description: Concentrator chipset (e.g. SX1302, SX1301, SX1303). Informational; the radio-block format is chipset-independent for the packet forwarders we template.

oui.description: IEEE OUI prefix(es) (6, 7, or 9 hex chars) registered to the maker, used by detection to map a scanned Gateway EUI to this vendor.

defaultUrl.description: Default admin URL or IP the box is reachable at out of the box.

apModeSsid.description: Wi-Fi AP-mode SSID pattern when the box hosts a setup access point (may contain XXXX for the per-unit suffix).

oneOf.description: Null when there is no factory default (operator sets credentials on first boot).

defaultCredentials.description: Documented factory-default credentials, or null. NEVER a security guarantee — firmware-dependent; the walkthrough must tell the operator to change them.

credentialsNote.description: Caveat about firmware dependence / first-login prompts. Required when defaultCredentials is null.

configMethods.description: How the operator can apply a config to this box (from definitions/config-methods.json configMethods).

packetForwarders.description: Packet forwarders this model supports (from definitions/config-methods.json packetForwarders).

template.description: Path (relative to the model folder) of the authored template for a packet forwarder.

forwarderFilePath.description: On-box path the rendered config is written to (forwarder-file method).

path.description: Menu path in the web UI (web-ui method).

config.description: Per-forwarder template + on-box path, and per-config-method access hints. Keys are forwarder ids and/or config-method ids.

variantOf.description: "<vendor>/<model>" of the base variant when this is a board/firmware revision with a different config skeleton, else null.

source.description: Provenance rank of the admin facts / template, best first: vendor-docs > vendor-config > captured > synthetic.

url.description: URL the reference/ snapshot was captured from.

sha256.description: sha256 of the captured reference/ documentation snapshot.

referencedAt.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the documentation was captured.

draft.description: True for a scaffolded-but-unauthored profile: hidden from gateways(), configScript throws, render/fixture conformance checks are skipped, and the published package ships none.
